title: E19 - Cobblemon Minimap Icons
description: Cobblemon icons from MBCMechachu for Xaero's Minimap.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BBCSgkwA/images/b7b71fcbd8bc982dfd7b31b851ee352e5355d24b.png) Cobblemon icons from MBCMechachu for Xaero's Minimap! ## Showcase ![shinyMark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BBCSgkwA/images/f81b5a1a7c3defd525e14530e154ebc3314951c0.png) - Includes Unmarked Shiny Version​​​​. ![uniqueForm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BBCSgkwA/images/ee4883a6c439cf678c23d68027cf6a3b333c61a5.png) - [Full Unique Forms List](https://wiki.cobblemon.com/index.php/Pokémon/Unique_Forms). ![speciesVariety](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BBCSgkwA/images/9c211dc9b02b3dd5dc62cd09057d53dd3f88ea80.png) - Supports All Cobblemon Form Variations. ![addonSupport](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BBCSgkwA/images/8f211b3d52e488ff369a360d51c88ed66aedc148.png) - Supported Addon List.

[GenoMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/genomons) - [Gholdengo Shiny Fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gholdengo-shiny-fix) - [HiddenMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hiddenmons-cobblemon) - [Hydro's Reanimodel Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hydro-reanimodel-pack) - [NotSoCobblemon Allone's Additions](https://modrinth.com/datapack/notsocobblemon-allones-additions) - [OdysseyMons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/odysseymons) - [Pigeon's PokePack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/pigeons-poke-pack) - ![bigIconVersion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BBCSgkwA/images/97cb69cab4ab1b3d5c9f951f5ba00be3f8aac6e9.png) - Big Icon Version Coming Soon. ## Guide **Keep Entity Icons Visible** 1. Enter your world and press "Y" to open the "Minimap Settings". 2. Select "Entity Radar Settings". 3. Change "Display Icons" to "Always". 4. Adjust "Entity Icon Scale" to a size that‘s convenient for you. **Display Only Pokémon Icons** 1. Enter .minecraft/config/xaero/minimap folder and open "default_radar_categories_client.json". 2. Replace `"hardInclude": "anything"` with `"hardInclude": "nothing"` 3. Replace `"includeList": []` with `"includeList": ["cobblemon:pokemon"]` **Using With Other Packs** - [Combee MC Remodel](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/combee-mc-remodel) should be placed above this pack. - All ​​other​​ packs ​​should​​ be placed​​ under this pack. ## Credit - Pokémon sprites are from [MBCMechachu](https://www.deviantart.com/mbcmechachu). His page has extensive credits for each contributed artists.
